title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 25 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 25 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 25 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, the main contract closed 611.5.and an increase of 1.83% throughout the day. The quotationin the morning was increased by 10-20 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, today's overall market transaction atmosphere is poor.
